full_text:
Fu Wan 伏完
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Wan (伏完)was born in Langya, Dongwu. Married a Princess, took a lesser position in Cao Cao’s court. Fu Wan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Fu Wan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
